$schema: Deliverable requirements per FCA-AI team pipeline stage. Used by verify-deliverables.mjs hook.

team-exec.note: No specific deliverables — implementation produces code changes. Verify fractal structure compliance post-execution.

team-verify.note: QA report must include FCA-AI rule compliance status.

team-fix.note: No specific deliverables — fixes are code changes. Re-verify after fix loop.

init.note: Initial FCA-AI project setup. INTENT.md must include 3-tier boundary sections. Rule docs under .claude/rules/ are deployed by the filid-setup skill via the rule_docs_sync MCP tool — not by session hooks, and not by project_init. Their presence is therefore not a required init deliverable.

review.note: Multi-persona review output covering architecture, QA, and drift analysis.

scan.note: Scan produces inline violation reports via MCP tools. No document deliverable required.
